summary_en: Daito Trust Construction completed post-adjustment on its FCSR commitment-based buyback, finalizing 6.92M shares acquired at average ¥3,615 through ToSTNeT-3 on 10 February 2026.
title_en: Notice of Completion of Post-Adjustment in Commitment-Based Share Buyback (FCSR)
translation_en_brief: Daito Trust Construction announced on 19 May 2026 the completion of post-adjustment procedures for its commitment-based share repurchase (FCSR) program. The final number of shares acquired was confirmed at 6,921,800 shares, including 120,000 shares purchased from shareholders other than Nomura Securities. The initial acquisition on 10 February 2026 via ToSTNeT-3 comprised 7,136,800 shares from Nomura Securities at an average price of ¥3,614.6977 per share. The post-adjustment mechanism, which applies a VWAP-based formula (Feb 12–May 18 VWAP average × 100.77% + ¥5.4) to establish a final acquisition price, resulted in a net reduction of 335,000 shares. These shares are being reissued to warrant holders via warrant exercise, a standard mechanism in FCSR programs to align pricing with post-announcement market conditions. The disclosure clarifies that this is a press release for informational purposes only and does not constitute investment solicitation.
